nasb.text: Solomon had twelve deputies over all Israel, who provided for the king and his household; each man had to provide for a month in the year.

esv.text: Solomon had twelve officers over all Israel, who provided food for the king and his household. Each man had to make provision for one month in the year.

cnv.text: 所羅門在全以色列立了十二個官員；他們為王和王家供應食物，每人每年供應一個月。

ccb.text: 所罗门在以色列全国设立了十二个地方官，负责供给王及王室的需用，每年每人负责一个月。
